\documentclass[
  11pt,
  twoside
]{book}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\newcommand{\vect}[1]{\boldsymbol{#1}}
\renewcommand{\chaptername}{Experiment}
\DeclareRobustCommand{\productname}{Mark}
\newrobustcmd{\pair}[2][,]{\langle #1 #2\rangle}
\input{shared/preamble}
\include{chapters/frontmatter}

\begin{document}
% A percent comment closes at the synthetic line ending.
\chapter[Scopes]{Scope-aware typesetting 🚀}
\label{chap:scopes}
Text remains readable in Ελληνικά, 日本語, café, and astral 𝌆.
An escaped percent \% is text, while the rest is a comment. % trailing note
\section*{Commands and groups}
\emph{Italic text with \textbf{nested bold} inside.}
\textit{A second italic form} and \texttt{raw-ish \{braces\}}.
\textbf{Bold text with a nested {plain group}.}
\marginpar[outer note]{inner note with \emph{style}}
Body text has a footnote[7]{Nested {content} and $x_7$.}
\newline
\pagebreak
\textcopyright\quad \texttrademark\quad \texteuro
\foo_bar:n { expl3 token }
\cs_new_protected:Npn \demo_render:n #1 { #1 }
\tl_set:Nn \l_demo_title_tl {Unicode 🚀 title}
\seq_map_inline:Nn \l_demo_items_seq {##1}

\section{Links, labels, citations, and references}
\label{sec:links}
\zlabel[user]{eq:energy}
\url{https://example.test/a_b?q=tex}
\path{chapters/intro.tex}
\url{https://example.test/reference}
\hyperref[chap:scopes]{the opening chapter}
\path{images/cover.png}
\cite{knuth:1984}
\parencite[see][p.~42]{lamport:1994}
\textcite<prenote>[postnote]{unicode:🚀}
\autocites{alpha:1}{beta_2}{gamma-三}
\bibentry{knuth.1984}
Chapter~\ref{chap:scopes}, Section~\autoref{sec:links}, and \pageref{sec:links}.
Compare \crefrange{eq:first}{eq:last} and \Cref{tab:results}.

\section[Mathematics]{Inline and display mathematics}
Dollar math $a_n = \sum_{k=0}^{n} k^2$ ends here.
Parenthesized math \(E = mc^2\) also ends here.
Escaped currency costs \$5 outside math.
\[
  f(x) = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}} e^{-x^2/2}
\]
$$
  \left|\vect{x}\right|^2 = \vect{x}\cdot\vect{x}
$$
\begin{equation}
  e^{i\pi}+1=0
  \label{eq:first}
\end{equation}
\begin{align*}
  a &= b + c \\
  d &= e - f
\end{align*}
\begin{gathered}
  x + y = 3 \\
  x - y = 1
\end{gathered}
\begin{pmatrix}
  1 & 0 \\
  0 & 1
\end{pmatrix}
\begin{empheq}[box=\fbox]{align}
  u+v &= w
\end{empheq}

\section{Lists and tables}
\begin{enumerate}
  \item First item with \cite{first:key}.
  \item Second item with nested material:
  \begin{description}
    \item[term] a definition with \ref{eq:first}.
  \end{description}
\end{enumerate}
\begin{tabular}{l>{$}c<{$}}
  name & value \\
  alpha & \alpha + 1 \\
  rocket 🚀 & \infty
\end{tabular}
\begin{longtable}{lr}
  key & count \\
  one & 1 \\
  two & 2
\end{longtable}

\section{Balanced specialty environments}
\begin{frame}{A beamer-like frame}
  \frametitle{Nested title}
  Frame content with $x+y$.
\end{frame}
\begin{tikzpicture}[scale=0.5]
  \draw (0,0) -- (1,1);
\end{tikzpicture}
\begin{theorem}[Unicode case]
  For every $\varepsilon>0$, choose $\delta>0$.
\end{theorem}
\begin{mpost}
  draw origin--(10,10);
\end{mpost}

\section{Verbatim forms}
Inline \verb|a_{b} % not a comment| follows ordinary text.
Starred \verb*+spaces  stay  raw+ ends at its delimiter.
\Verb\scantokens{raw \macro{payload}}
\mintinline{python}|print("λ🚀")|
\pythoninline{value = {"key": 3}}
\begin{verbatim}
if (x < y) { printf("% raw 🚀"); }
\section{not a real section here}
\end{verbatim}
\begin{VerbatimOut}{generated.txt}
literal output with \commands and % signs
\end{VerbatimOut}
\begin{alltt}
Mostly raw, but \textbf is recognized by the grammar.
\end{alltt}
\begin{comment}
Everything here is comment content, including $math$ and 🚀.
\end{comment}

\section{Embedded and missing scopes}
% The vendored grammar routes this body through the absent source.asy include.
\begin{minted}[linenos]{asy}
size(100);
pair A=(0,0), B=(1,1);
draw(A--B, red);
label("🚀", B);
\end{minted}
\cacheMeCode[asy]{draw(unitcircle);}
\begin{pycode}
message = "embedded Python closure"
print(message)
\end{pycode}
\directlua{tex.print("inline Lua")}

\section{Song and layout specialties}
\begin{songs}{2}
\beginsong{Orbit}[by={Ada},sr={demo}]
\[C]Ground control to ^the Unicode crew 🚀
\endsong
\end{songs}
\begin{minipage}{0.45\textwidth}
General environments recurse into \LaTeX{} commands.
\end{minipage}
\footnote{A final note with \url{https://example.test/end}.}
\clearpage

\section{Multiline arguments}
\href
  {https://example.test/multiline}
  {a link split across lines}
\newcommand{\multiline}[2][default]{
  \textbf{#1}: \emph{#2}
}
\marginpar[
  short
]{
  A longer nested margin note.
}
\subsection{Final checks}
The range \ref{eq:first}--\ref{eq:last} stays linked.
\begin{equation}
  z = x + y
  \label{eq:last}
\end{equation}
